falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a key resistance level identified in the bottom_2024_aug pattern) by 3% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a reversal pattern contrary to the 2024 bottom's bearish implications

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average of the VIX crosses below 12 (a historically significant low volatility threshold)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a move would indicate extreme complacency, directly contradicting the blowoff score's implication of impending volatility

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern match percentage increases to 90% similarity with bottom_2024_aug while the blowoff score drops below 20 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would confirm a high-probability bottom formation, directly refuting the current 'UNKNOWN' verdict and 'HOLD' signal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
